Ines Saroman

a day ago  ·
On my journey to learn German I learn a lot about myself too. Languages are challenging, but your brain's resistance to be bad at something is even more challenging.
Learning through music is something that I found intimidating before but now with my partner in crime Gemini and a good mood I am unstoppable. Link to my German song of the day in comments.
P.S. I am starting a A.2.2 course on Monday and will be breaking my brain for hours most of the week. Wish me luck. The go…
See more
p294mV7o.com
Vladimir
On my journey to learn German I learn a lot about myself too. Languages are challenging, but your brain's resistance to be bad at something is even more challenging. Learning through music is something that I found intimidating before but now with my partner in crime Gemini and a good mood I am unstoppable. Link to my German song of the day in comments. P.S. I am starting a A.2.2 course on Monday and will be breaking my brain for hours most of the week. Wish me luck. The goal is to complete B1 by the end of the year
